title: Article 50 Transparency Implementation Briefs v0.1
author: Kotov Ivan
non_claim_boundary: not a formal Article 50 compliance claim
formal compliance remains deployment-specific and subject to legal review
core_policy_pattern: system boundary -> actor role -> obligation trigger -> disclosure or marking control -> evidence artifact -> responsible actor -> correction or review route
core_engineering_pattern: AI-assisted workflow -> task contract -> permission scope -> sandbox/worktree boundary -> witness event -> provenance sidecar -> human review -> human gate -> release/rejection -> rollback/correction route
